profile.name: Kirtan Joshi
profile.title: Software Engineer & UI Developer
profile.bio: 18-year-old student developer learning computer science through coding, projects, and continuous improvement.

projects.title: Airline Reservation System
projects.description: A terminal-based Airline Reservation System built in Python using MySQL for persistent storage. The system supports both users and admins, allowing flight booking, seat selection, cancellations, reporting, and more!

projects.title: Nebula E-Commerce
projects.description: Headless storefront utilizing a custom animation engine for fluid transitions and 3D product previews.
